## KARIMO

Uses [KARIMO](https://github.com/opensesh/KARIMO) for PRD-driven autonomous dev.

### Quick Reference

- **Commands:** `/karimo:` to see all commands
- **Agent rules:** `.claude/plugins/karimo/KARIMO_RULES.md`
- **Configuration:** `.karimo/config.yaml`
- **Learnings:** `.karimo/learnings/`

### GitHub Configuration

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Owner Type | _pending_ |
| Owner | _pending_ |
| Repository | _pending_ |

_Run `/karimo:configure` to detect+populate._
